name: testEditAcquirerVerifyUpdatedData
description: Edit Acquirer and Verify Updated Data in the Table
descriptionHtml: Edit Acquirer and Verify Updated Data in the Table

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Edit Acquirer and Verify Updated Data in the Table

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Type '0725.154734 acquirer for edit form' into 'Select acquirer' field
Click '0725.154734 acquirer for edit form' in dropdown
Verify: The 'Edit acquirer' dialog is no longer visible
Verify: Acquirer code is 'NGenius' by default
Verify: Acquirer MID MCC matches expected
Verify: Currencies column contains expected currency
Verify: 'System config' cell contains all values in correct order
